integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Azure DevOps web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Azure DevOps UI, opening work items, and using the built-in dropdowns and tag inputs, rather than using a terminal or API script.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to alter the visual state of the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open or used to fake the State or Tags in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent navigated to each user story to read the QA comments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent viewing the 'Discussion' section of the work items to read the 'QA Note' before making changes.
